name: Robert Schimmel
bio: Robert Schimmel was an American stand-up comedian known for raunchy, sexually explicit blue comedy that drew on his own life, including his marriage and his battle with cancer. Regarded as a comics comic through relentless touring, comedy albums, and frequent HBO and Howard Stern appearances, he ranked No. 76 on Comedy Centrals 100 Greatest Stand-Ups of All Time. He died in 2010 from injuries sustained in a car accident.

timeline.ev: Performs on Rodney Dangerfields HBO Young Comedians Special

accolades: Comedy Central 100 Greatest Stand-Ups of All Time (No. 76)
